content: Remote OK Collections Manager National Service Bureau <strong>Benefits:<br><br></strong><ul><li>401(k) matching</li><li>Dental insurance</li><li>Health insurance</li><li>Paid time off</li><li>Vision insurance<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Competitive Salary</li><li>Employer Paid Medical, Dental, Vision Insurance</li><li>Company Provides EAP (Employee Assistance Program)</li><li>Paid Time Off</li><li>401(k) plan + employer matching contributions</li><li>Monday to Friday schedule</li><li>Must be based out of Sarasota, FL! <br><br><br></li></ul><strong>GROW WITH US! <br><br></strong>National Service Bureau (NSB) is seeking an experienced Call Center/Collections Manager. NSB is focused on Accounts Receivable Management and Subrogation and has grown exponentially over the last 34 years to become a leading national agency. We are looking to find a leader whom is self-motivated, accountable and engaged in personal growth.<br><br><strong>Collections Manager Job Description:<br><br></strong>We are seeking a Collections Manager with experience leading teams, who can empathize with consumers and has the ability to maintain professionalism at all times. This role ensures that all call center, collections, and training goals are met. Other job functions include:<br><br><ul><li>Analyzes, evaluates, and reports on performance, service, KPIs and other metrics </li><li>Makes recommendations for action plans</li><li>Perform continued training and education</li><li>Implements call center and collection operational strategies</li><li>Provides daily personnel management and oversight</li><li>Conducts regular 1:1âs and annual performance reviews</li><li>Recommends changes to employee levels based on activity and performance</li><li>Enforce company policies and hold team members accountable<br><br><br></li></ul><strong> Collections Manager Skills Required:<br><br></strong><ul><li>3-5+ years in a high volume collections management</li><li>Experience in managing a remote team environment</li><li>Experience scheduling call center operations and running call campaigns</li><li>Excellent call center and/or collections management skills</li><li>Results oriented with the energy and ability to deliver results daily</li><li>Strong analytical and problem solving skills</li><li>Understanding of and respect for compliance</li><li>Positive attitude and approach</li><li>Ability to drive, encourage, and motivate a team</li><li>Willingness to exemplify our Core Values<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Core Values:<br><br></strong><ul><li> Follow Through</li><li> Be Engaged</li><li> Think First</li><li> Be Respectful</li><li> Be Accountable<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>NSB Culture &amp; Environment:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Diverse and friendly team</li><li>Emphasis on work/life balance</li><li>Guaranteed no nights/weekends</li><li>Positive environment</li><li>Performance-based incentives</li><li>Advancement opportunities<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>NSB is very proud of our team and the environment they are helping to foster here. Weâre excited for you to join us! <br><br></strong>To stay up to date on our latest postings we invite you to:<br><br><strong>Like us on FaceBook:<br><br></strong>https://www.facebook.com/nationalservicebureau/<br><br><strong>Follow us on LinkedIn:<br><br></strong>https://www.linkedin.com/company/national-service-bureau-inc./mycompany/<br><br><strong>Visit our careers page:<br><br></strong>https://national-service-bureau.careerplug.com/account<br><br>Salary Range: $60,000 - 90,000/yr<br><br>This is a remote position. customer support, design, jira Sarasota, Sarasota, Florida, United States 2026-06-26T17:15:18+00:00 1134155 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-collections-manager-national-service-bureau-1134155 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Entry Level Administrative Assistant Recruit Lytics Hiring <p>Our fast-growing company is seeking a dedicated <strong>Entry-Level Administrative Assistant</strong> to support the smooth operation of our daily business activities. In this role, you will assist with organizing, updating, and maintaining accurate company records and databases while ensuring information is handled efficiently and correctly.</p> <p>You will also provide general administrative support across teams, helping to improve workflow and streamline internal processes. Strong computer skills, a willingness to learn, and a keen eye for detail are essential for success in this position.</p> <p>This remote opportunity offers flexible working arrangements and the chance to grow within a supportive and dynamic work environment.</p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>What Youâll Be Doing:</strong></p> <ul><li>Perform data entry and maintain accurate records across internal systems </li><li>Update spreadsheets, trackers, and documentation regularly </li><li>Organize digital files and ensure information is easy to access </li><li>Assist with scheduling, task coordination, and administrative workflows </li><li>Monitor and follow up on assigned tasks to ensure completion </li><li>Support internal teams by maintaining structured and up-to-date information </li><li>Identify and flag missing or inconsistent data for correction </li><li>Maintain clear and professional written communication </li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>What Weâre Looking For:</strong></p> <ul><li>Strong attention to detail and accuracy </li><li>Good organizational and time management skills </li><li>Ability to follow instructions and structured workflows </li><li>Basic familiarity with tools like Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel </li><li>Clear written communication skills </li><li>Ability to manage repetitive tasks with consistency </li><li>Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment </li><li>No prior experience required â training will be provided </li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Tools &amp; Work Environment:</strong></p> <ul><li>Spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel) </li><li>Internal tracking and documentation systems </li><li>Email and communication platforms </li><li>Remote collaboration tools (chat and video calls) </li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Benefits:</strong></p> <ul><li>Competitive entry-level compensation </li><li>Flexible remote working schedule </li><li>Structured onboarding and training support </li><li>Opportunities for career growth in administration and operations </li>&l
